task: Go to 'https://analytics.google.com/analytics/web/?pli=1#/a124382116p399448899/reports/explorer?params=_u..nav%3Dmaui%26_u.comparisonOption%3Ddisabled%26_u.date00%3D20260202%26_u.date01%3D20260215%26_r.explorerCard..rowsPerPage%3D25&collectionId=11113654410&ruid=f4b7cbea-3789-4f4d-9df7-ba150bce3a52&r=all-pages-and-screens'. Set the date range from Feb 23, 2026 to Mar 1, 2026 in the date range selector (Use the following format E.g. Feb 2, 2026 - Feb 9, 2026). Then click Apply (use javascript to find and click the apply button as the coordinate clicks and enter key will not work). Once you click apply, the table will reload with new table data. This is important - Please wait for the table to reload after you have clicked apply, and only then go through table and return the page views for the top 15 urls for newly generated table. The page views are in the 'Views' column, that sits next to 'Active User' column. Please  return the views in the views column, and the url associated to the view count.
